message:
docs: add Tier 0 critical integrations to NTM improvement plan

Major expansion of PLAN_TO_IMPROVE_NTM_PROJECT.md with 9 newly discovered
Tier 0 critical integrations that have zero current usage but maximum impact:

- Agent Mail Macros: One-call session bootstrap (macro_start_session,
  macro_prepare_thread, macro_file_reservation_cycle, macro_contact_handshake)
- File Reservation Lifecycle: Reserve → Work → Release pattern with
  force-release for crashed agents and pre-commit guards
- BV Mega-Commands: -robot-triage replaces 4 separate calls, 37/41
  robot modes currently unused
- CM Server Mode: HTTP daemon at port 8765 vs subprocess calls
- Destructive Command Protection: Claude Code PreToolUse hooks for
  mechanical safety enforcement
- Session Coordinator Intelligence: Transform passive identity to active
  coordinator with inbox polling and health monitoring
- BD Message Integration: bd message send/inbox/read/ack commands
- BD Daemon Mode: Background sync with --auto-commit --auto-push
- BV -robot-markdown: 50% token savings vs JSON

Document now self-contained for external LLM review with:
- Complete ecosystem context (NTM, bd, bv, cm, cass, Agent Mail MCP)
- Go code examples for each integration
- Updated priority matrix and implementation roadmap
- Success metrics with Tier 0 targets

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
